mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, u.username, c.content, c.created_at FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT user_id FROM comments WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (id, post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{id}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
